name: Burgie's cozy kitchen
short_description: Manage a small burger joint in this adorable and chaotic idle cooking game. Play actively or use it a desktop companion while you work on your stuff. ✨Brighten your day with little breaks! Includes Pomodoro focus tool and stream integration to play with your chat.
detailed_description:
Burgie's cozy kitchen is a small wholesome game about managing your own street burger joint. Enjoy its cozy and relaxed style, with a few adorably chaotic moments!

Cook for your customers and upgrade your burger joint 🍔

🌸 Relaxing, cute, and cozy game to play at your own pace.

💡 Simple yet polished mechanics, all interconnected.

🤫 Multiple secret mechanics to discover as you progress.

🍂 A funny physics system that makes everything more real and fun.

💻 Play actively or minimize it on your desktop while you handle new orders.

⏱ 4~8 hours of progressively unlockable content. Concludes with a leaderboard for those who want to continue longer.

Play while you work or play other things ✍

This game allows you to minimize the counter to a corner of the screen to focus on other tasks while waiting for new orders.

When a new order comes in, a bell rings to prepare their burger and serve them as best as possible. Tips and improving your kitchen will depend on their reviews!

Different game modes 🕹

🔥 Frenetic Mode: Play actively with constant impatient picky customers.

☕ Relax Mode: Minimize the game, attending to customers every 5-15 minutes, and brighten your day with short breaks.

📚 Pomodoro Mode: Minimize the game, set the timer, and a new customer will notify you when it's time to take a break. Ideal as a gamified focus tool.

🤩 Streamer Mode: Combine any of the above modes with your stream. Viewers can play through your livestream chat with a simple command and place the craziest order they can think of. They'll also complain if you mess up!

Play with your chat: Integration with Twitch, YouTube, Kick, and Tiktok chat 💬

You can connect the game to your YouTube, Kick, Tiktok, or Twitch chat to receive your own viewers and their orders. You can chat individually with each of them, serve them any food you want, and much more! They'll also affect your reviews, helping (or not) you climb the global Streamers ranking.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, French*, Italian*, Spanish - Latin America*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal*, German*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*, Japanese*, Polish*, Russian*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*
*languages with full audio support
